title: Scope
full_text:
3.1.1.1 Scope
Scope
1) This Part is concerned with the transfer of heat and air through
  a) building materials, components and assemblies forming part of the building
envelope, and
  b) interfaces between building materials, components and assemblies forming
part of the building envelope.

sentences.text: This Part is concerned with the transfer of heat and air through

clauses.text: building materials, components and assemblies forming part of the building envelope, and
interfaces between building materials, components and assemblies forming part of the building envelope.
